name: Beef with Pickled Walnuts
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Beef dripping or olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the meats by removing all traces of fat, gristle, and membrane. Cut into large chunks.
2. Slice onions into eighths.
3. Scrub or scrape carrots and cut into 1/2 to 3/4 inch lengths.
4. Toss meat, onions, and carrots with seasoned flour in batches. Brown and seal in a sizzling hot frying pan barely coated with dripping or well-flavored oil.
5. Transfer contents to a flameproof casserole.
6. Wash the frying pan with some stock and add to the casserole.
7. Add remaining stock, 3 tbsp juice from pickled walnuts jar, and bay leaves.
8. Season with salt and pepper. Bring to simmering point.
9. Cover and cook at 300°F (150°C) gas mark 2 for about 3 hours until meat is very tender and gravy is richly flavored.
10. Add quartered or sliced pickled walnuts to the beef.
11. Check seasoning and cook for an additional 15 minutes before serving.
